Reza Abbasi

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Reza Abbasi Paintings
by Reza Abbasi
Safavid · c. 1600
The defining painter of the late Safavid court — languid youths, calligraphic lines, single figures filling the page. He turned Persian miniature away from narrative tableaux toward portraiture.
←Tagore, Abanindranath Riza-yi Abbasi→
